message:
feat(test): add 31 V2 TUI tests across 4 modules [br-2bbt.11]

- tui_panel_helpers: 12 new tests (was 0) — panel_block themes, render_empty_state
  boundaries, zero/offset areas, fallback paths
- tui_ws_input: 8 new tests — oversized body, key truncation at char boundary,
  pong handling, empty batch, default modifiers
- tui_ws_state: 6 new tests — empty/malformed query strings, duplicate keys,
  negative since, exact boundary limits
- tui_decision: 9 new edge case tests — extreme change ratio, zero/negative budget,
  max errors, rapid transitions, posterior convergence monotonicity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
